title: Medical Dosimetrists
description: Generate radiation treatment plans, develop radiation dose calculations, communicate and supervise the treatment plan implementation, and consult with members of radiation oncology team.

tasks.text: Design the arrangement of radiation fields to reduce exposure to critical patient structures, such as organs, using computers, manuals, and guides.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan the use of beam modifying devices, such as compensators, shields, and wedge filters, to ensure safe and effective delivery of radiation treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and outline bodily structures, using imaging procedures, such as x-ray, magnetic resonance imaging, computed tomography, or positron emission tomography.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate the delivery of radiation treatment, such as the amount or extent of radiation per session, based on the prescribed course of radiation therapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate, or verify calculations of, prescribed radiation doses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop radiation treatment plans in consultation with members of the radiation oncology team.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or perform simulations for tumor localizations, using imaging methods such as magnetic resonance imaging, computed tomography, or positron emission tomography scans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create and transfer reference images and localization markers for treatment delivery, using image-guided radiation therapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record patient information, such as radiation doses administered, in patient records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise oncology team members on use of beam modifying or immobilization devices in radiation treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fabricate beam modifying devices, such as compensators, shields, and wedge filters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform quality assurance system checks, such as calibrations, on treatment planning computers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fabricate patient immobilization devices, such as molds or casts, for radiation delivery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop requirements for the use of patient immobilization devices and positioning aides, such as molds or casts, as part of treatment plans to ensure accurate delivery of radiation and comfort of patient.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach medical dosimetry, including its application, to students, radiation therapists, or residents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct radiation oncology-related research, such as improving computer treatment planning systems or developing new treatment devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop treatment plans, and calculate doses for brachytherapy procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure the amount of radioactivity in patients or equipment, using radiation monitoring devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Educate patients regarding treatment plans, physiological reactions to treatment, or post-treatment care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
